content:
- completed story-20 task 02 end-to-end: flattened runner destination config to one explicit PostgreSQL target boundary, added shared runtime/config drift audits in `RunnerPublicContract`, updated runner fixtures/docs/tests, and renamed the runtime-plan conflict error to match the new target language
- required gates passed: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test`; `make test` initially failed on one outdated bootstrap-contract expectation after the error rename, which was fixed and then rerun green end-to-end
- task file and execution plan are marked complete, Ralph task switch has been executed, and the remaining step is to commit all changes (including `.ralph`) and push before quitting immediately
